questions.question: What is the largest provincial capital in Luzon in terms of land area?

answer_key.explanation: Ilagan City in Isabela province became the newest Philippine city in December 2012. It is the capital city of the province and is the largest city (land area) in Luzon.

questions.question: This island in Zamboanga City in Mindanao Island is famous for its pink sand beach. What is the name of this island?

answer_key.explanation: Santa Cruz Island is just south of Zamboanga City and boasts pink-sand beaches.

questions.question: This city is nicknamed as the 'City in the Sky'. What is the name of this highly urbanized city?

answer_key.explanation: Antipolo City is called the 'City in the Sky' because it is located at a higher altitude in the mountains of Rizal province compared to its neighboring cities in Metro Manila.

questions.question: This body of water separates Guimaras island from Panay island. What is the name of this strait?

answer_key.explanation: The Iloilo Strait separates Iloilo province in Panay island from the island province of Guimaras. Guimaras Strait separates Guimaras from Negros island.

questions.question: This Philippine island is the 62nd largest island in the world. What is this island?

answer_key.explanation: Negros is the third largest island in the Philippines.

questions.question: Which city is the official capital of Agusan del Norte?

answer_key.explanation: Cabadbaran is the de jure capital of the province of Agusan del Norte. It is the second town to become a city in the province of Agusan del Norte after Butuan City.

questions.question: Verde Island is the largest island within the Verde Island Passage in terms of land area.

answer_key.explanation: The VIP (Verde Island Passage) is a body of water between the island of Mindoro and the province of Batangas in the island of Luzon. The largest island in the area is Maricaban Island.

questions.question: Which of the following is the largest island in the Calamianes Group of Islands which hosts an airport that is a jump off point to its neighboring islands?

answer_key.explanation: Busuanga Island is the largest island in the Calamianes Group. It is also the gateway to the famous Coron island and the Calauit Game Preserve.

questions.question: The world famous island of Boracay is part of which municipality in the province of Aklan?

answer_key.explanation: Boracay is part of the municipality of Malay in Aklan's far north. It is famous for its powdery white sand beach.

questions.question: This city was the last capital during the Spanish occupation of the Philippines. Which of the following is this city?

answer_key.explanation: In 1898, just prior to the turnover of the Philippines from Spain to the US through the Treaty of Paris, the capital of Las Islas Filipinas was moved to Iloilo City.
